service.name: OpenAI Text-to-Speech API
service.description_for_ai: High-quality text-to-speech. 6 voices, fast generation. $15/1M chars. Natural sounding speech in many languages. Use for reading text aloud, voice assistants, audiobook narration.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Convert text to speech. 6 voices, multiple formats, speed control. $15/1M characters.

model.description: tts-1 (fast, lower quality) or tts-1-hd (slower, studio quality)

input.description: Text to synthesize. Max 4096 chars. Use sentence breaks for natural pauses.

voice.description: alloy (neutral), echo (male), fable (British male), onyx (deep male), nova (female), shimmer (female). Each has distinct character.

response_format.description: mp3 (default, streaming), opus (best compression), aac (Apple), flac (lossless), wav (no compression), pcm (raw 24kHz)

speed.description: Playback speed 0.25-4.0. Default 1.0. 0.8 for slower, clearer speech.

fields: binary audio stream in specified format

capabilities.description_for_ai: Handle text longer than 4096 chars by splitting at sentence boundaries and concatenating audio.

input.description: One chunk under 4096 chars. Split at '. ', '! ', '? ' boundaries.

response_format.description: Use opus for smaller files when concatenating

capabilities.description_for_ai: Stream TTS audio to client in real-time. Reduces latency — start playback before full generation.

model.description: tts-1 recommended for streaming due to lower latency

response_format.description: mp3 or opus for streaming. Set Accept: audio/mpeg header.

fields: chunked audio bytes — pipe directly to audio player

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate same text in multiple voices to compare and select best voice for use case.

voice.description: One of: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer. Make separate requests for each.

agent_hints.voice_guide: alloy=neutral balanced, echo=male warm, fable=British accent, onyx=deep authoritative, nova=friendly female, shimmer=soft female
agent_hints.streaming: Response is streaming audio binary. For web: create Blob URL from response.
agent_hints.length: Max 4096 chars per request. Split longer text into chunks.
